name: Mikkan
bio: For Mikkan, wisdom is the warm light that guides us through the darkness. He believes that knowledge should be a beacon of hope, illuminating the path forward for humanity and helping us to find our way.
speech_style: 語尾が〜である ( calm and reassuring )
